meaning: n.大草原,牧场,<美方>林间小空地
examples: The prairie vole is one such animal.
But winters on the prairie can still get pretty harsh today.
To assemble a prairie takes time—even if you have all the pieces.
Now, at age 51, Crump is overhauling the Eden Prairie, Minnesota company he started in 1988.
Grand Prairie police detective Brody Burns thinks Sweesy gambled much of the money away.
